summary: Highly praised audience recording hailed as a gem, capturing an excellent performance
review: The sole review gives the tape a full five‑star rating, calling it another gem from suraci and emphasizing its quality as an audience recording. No specific musical moments are cited, but the enthusiastic tone suggests both the show and the capture are well‑received.
